name: codex-agent-delegation
description: Guarded multi-agent delegation for Codex using Claude, Gemini, Kimi, GLM, DeepSeek, MiniMax, and Perplexity.

interface.longDescription: Codex Agent Delegation packages guarded local scripts for Claude review and execution, Gemini/Kimi/GLM/DeepSeek/MiniMax discussion, DeepSeek patch proposals, Perplexity research with citations, and council runs that keep Codex as the orchestrator.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Codex Agent Delegation to run a guarded multi-agent council on this plan.
